UserConfig.title: User Configuration
UserConfig.description: Stores user-specific Discord bot settings and encrypted bot token.

userId.description: Firebase Authentication UID of the owner.

encryptedToken.description: Client-side encrypted Discord bot token (AES format).

salt.description: Salt used for client-side encryption key derivation.

botName.description: Name of the discord bot cached during setup.

systemPrompt.description: Custom system instructions for the AI's discord personality.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the configuration was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the configuration was last updated.

ActivityLog.title: Activity Log
ActivityLog.description: Audit logs of operations performed by the AI Server Architect on Discord.

userId.description: The user ID who triggered this action.

guildId.description: The Discord Guild ID where the action was executed.

guildName.description: The name of the Discord Guild.

actionType.description: Type of action (e.g., CREATE_CHANNEL, CREATE_ROLE, DELETE_CHANNEL).

details.description: A description of the action completed.

status.description: Status of execution: SUCCESS or FAILED.

/userConfigs/{userId}.description: User configuration document mapped directly by Firebase UID.

/userConfigs/{userId}/logs/{logId}.description: Sub-collection of logs of bot activities triggered by the user.
